judgment.summary: A company with strong revenue and earnings growth, but facing challenges in profitability metrics and analyst growth estimates.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter missed EPS estimate by 3.3%; next earnings date is 2026-07-21.
positives: Revenue growth YoY 46.3% — exceptionally strong top-line expansion.
Quarterly earnings growth 54.8% — significant recent earnings acceleration.
Forward P/E 7.57x — very attractive valuation relative to future earnings expectations.
Mean analyst target $255.19 suggests significant upside from current price.
negatives: Profit margin 8.9% and Return on Equity 3.3% are modest.
Analyst growth estimate for current Q is -13.2%, indicating expected near-term decline.
Last quarter missed EPS estimate by 3.3%.
Dividend payout ratio is high at 86.1%, potentially limiting future dividend growth or reinvestment.

news.paragraph: Capital One Financial Corporation (COF) recently saw its board approve a quarterly dividend amidst reported top-line growth, according to recent headlines. An analyst firm also published its view on the company, though specific details were not provided. The upcoming earnings date on July 21st will be a key catalyst to watch for further insights into the company's performance.
